# pii_geo corpus. Synthetic coordinates (San Francisco), check-valid.

# === Geolocation (Block 8b) ===
# Decimal-pair patterns are range-validated (lat +/-90, lon +/-180).
# expect: Geo URI
geo:37.786971,-122.399677
# expect: ISO 6709 Coordinates
+37.786971-122.399677/
# expect: Map Link Coordinates
https://www.google.com/maps/@37.786971,-122.399677,15z
# expect: KML Coordinates
<coordinates>-122.399677,37.786971</coordinates>
# expect: GeoJSON Point
{"type": "Point", "coordinates": [-122.399677, 37.786971]}
# expect: what3words Address
///filled.count.soap
# expect: Plus Code (Open Location Code)
849VCWC8+R9
# expect: WKT Geometry
POINT (-122.399677 37.786971)
# expect: GPX Track Point
<trkpt lat="37.786971" lon="-122.399677">
# expect: EXIF GPS Tag
GPSLatitude: 37 deg 47 min 13.10 sec N
# expect: NMEA Sentence
$GPGGA,123519,4807.038,N,01131.000,E,1,08,0.9,545.4,M,46.9,M,,*47
